lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੮॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee naame hee sukh paaeidaa |16|8|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, He blesses us with His Naam, and throgh the Naam, peace is found. ||16||8||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape sachaa sabad milaae |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself unites us in the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabade vichahu bharam chukaae |
lines.english: Within the Shabad, doubt is driven out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar veparavaahe |
lines.english: He is inaccessible, unfathomable and self-sustaining.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਅਗਮ ਅਥਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape miharavaan agam athaahe |
lines.english: He Himself is merciful, inaccessible and unlimited.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade sach samaaveh |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Shabad, he merges in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aparr koe na sakai tis no gurasabadee melaaeaa |1|
lines.english: No one can reach up to Him; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is met. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁਨੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tudhuno seveh jo tudh bhaaveh |
lines.english: He alone serves You, who pleases You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anadin gun raveh din raatee rasanaa har ras bhaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Night and day, he chants the Lord's Praises, day and night; his tongue savors and delights in the sublime essence of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਸੇ ਮਰਣੁ ਸਵਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabad mareh se maran savaareh |
lines.english: Those who die in the Shabad - their death is exalted and glorified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har ke gun hiradai ur dhaareh |
lines.english: They enshrine the Lord's Glories in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam safal har charanee laage doojaa bhaau chukaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Holding tight to the Guru's feet, their lives becomes prosperous, and they are rid of the love of duality. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਤੇ ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa har bhagatee raate is jag meh laahaa paaeaa |4|
lines.english: Those who remain attuned to devotional worship to the Lord, night and day, earn the profit in this world. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮੇਲੇ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo mele aap milaae |
lines.english: The Dear Lord unites them in Union with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade aap gavaae |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Shabad, self-conceit is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਕਹਾ ਮੈ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tere gun kahaa mai kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: What Glorious Virtues of Yours should I describe? I cannot describe them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape deaa kare sukhadaataa gun meh gunee samaaeaa |5|
lines.english: When the Giver of peace Himself bestows His Mercy, the virtuous are absorbed in virtue. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ant na paaraa keemat nahee paaee |
lines.english: You have no end or limitation. Your value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh agiaanee andh andhaaraa |
lines.english: The ignorant, self-willed manmukh is immersed in utter darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh mohu hai paasaaraa |
lines.english: In this world, emotional attachment is spread all over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: dhandhai dhaavat janam gavaaeaa bin naavai dukh paaeaa |6|
lines.english: Chasing after worldly affairs, he wastes away his life in vain; without the Name, he suffers in pain. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: karam hovai taa satigur paae |
lines.english: If God grants His Grace, then one finds the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mail sabad jalaae |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the filth of egotism is burned away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: man niramal giaan ratan chaanan agiaan andher gavaaeaa |7|
lines.english: The mind becomes immaculate, and the jewel of spiritual wisdom brings enlightenment; the darkness of spiritual ignorance is dispelled. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਉਣੁ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: keemat kaun kare prabh teree too aape sehaj samaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Who can estimate Your value, God? You are immersed and absorbed in Yourself. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਅਨੇਕ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tere naam anek keemat nahee paaee |
lines.english: Your Names are countless; Your value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sach naam har hiradai vasaaee |
lines.english: I enshrine the Lord's True Name within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋ ਹੋਆ ਤੋਲਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko hoaa tolanahaaraa |
lines.english: No one can weigh it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam amolak agam apaaraa |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is priceless, inaccessible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤੋਲੇ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੋਲਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਤੋਲਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape tole tol tolaae gurasabadee mel tolaaeaa |9|
lines.english: You Yourself weigh, and estimate all; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, You unite, when the weight is perfect. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਬਹਾਲਹਿ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: too aape mel bahaaleh paas |
lines.english: Please, let me sit near You, and unite me with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sevak seveh kareh aradaas |
lines.english: Your servant serves, and offers this prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea kaa sukhadaataa poorai karam dhiaaeaa |10|
lines.english: You are the Giver of peace to all beings; by perfect karma, we meditate on You. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਜਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jat sat sanjam ji sach kamaavai |
lines.english: Chastity, truth and self-control come by practicing and living the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: eis bikh meh amrit paraapat hovai har jeeo mere bhaaeaa |11|
lines.english: In this world of poison, the Ambrosial Nectar is obtained, if it pleases my Dear Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man niramal ji har gun gaavai |
lines.english: This mind becomes immaculate and pure, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no bujhaae soee boojhai |
lines.english: He alone understands, whom God inspires to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਏ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa tthaak rahaae sahaje hee sach paaeaa |12|
lines.english: Egotism and possessiveness are silenced and subdued, and one intuitively finds the True Lord. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavai andar soojhai |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, one's inner being is awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਚੁਕੈ ਨ ਫੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar jamai chukai na feree |
lines.english: They die, and die again, only to be reborn; they cannot escape the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾ ਰਾਤਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: bikh kaa raataa bikh kamaavai sukh na kabahoo paaeaa |13|
lines.english: Imbued with poison, they practice poison and corruption, and they never find peace. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਹੋਰ ਫਿਰੈ ਘਨੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin karamaa hor firai ghaneree |
lines.english: Without good karma, countless others wander around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai haumai kinai na maaree |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one has conquered egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੇ ਭੇਖ ਕਰੇ ਭੇਖਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bahute bhekh kare bhekhadhaaree |
lines.english: Many disguise themselves with religious robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਇਸੁ ਤਨਹਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan trisanaa is taneh jalaae |
lines.english: Spiritual ignorance and desire burn this human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai taa mukat paae sachai naae samaaeaa |14|
lines.english: One who remains dead while yet alive is liberated, and merges in the True Name. ||14||
